svg.text: Request 4: MLRS recalc seam probe
Linearity / odd-symmetry checks and a slow synodic-like waveform probe at the bounded recalc seam.
Linearity suite
-0.005 ns: mean Δ93 = -0.005000 ns, changed 93 = 1456/1761, npt ΔTOF = -5.000e-12 s, npt ΔPmM = -5.000 ps
-0.002 ns: mean Δ93 = -0.002000 ns, changed 93 = 1456/1761, npt ΔTOF = -2.000e-12 s, npt ΔPmM = -2.000 ps
-0.001 ns: mean Δ93 = -0.001000 ns, changed 93 = 1456/1761, npt ΔTOF = -1.000e-12 s, npt ΔPmM = -1.000 ps
+0.001 ns: mean Δ93 = 0.001000 ns, changed 93 = 1456/1761, npt ΔTOF = 1.000e-12 s, npt ΔPmM = 1.000 ps
+0.002 ns: mean Δ93 = 0.002000 ns, changed 93 = 1456/1761, npt ΔTOF = 2.000e-12 s, npt ΔPmM = 2.000 ps
+0.005 ns: mean Δ93 = 0.005000 ns, changed 93 = 1456/1761, npt ΔTOF = 5.000e-12 s, npt ΔPmM = 5.000 ps
odd symmetry:
eps=0.001 ns -> frrec sum=-2.964e-15, npt TOF sum=0.000e+00, npt PmM sum=0.000e+00
eps=0.002 ns -> frrec sum=4.456e-15, npt TOF sum=0.000e+00, npt PmM sum=0.000e+00
eps=0.005 ns -> frrec sum=8.541e-15, npt TOF sum=0.000e+00, npt PmM sum=0.000e+00
scaling:
eps=0.001 ns -> gain(Δ93/eps)=1.000000, gain(ΔTOF/eps)=1.000e-09, gain(ΔPmM/eps)=1000.000
eps=0.002 ns -> gain(Δ93/eps)=1.000000, gain(ΔTOF/eps)=1.000e-09, gain(ΔPmM/eps)=1000.000
eps=0.005 ns -> gain(Δ93/eps)=1.000000, gain(ΔTOF/eps)=1.000e-09, gain(ΔPmM/eps)=1000.000
Slow waveform suite
synthetic model: A = 0.005000 ns, P = 2551442.8 s
Reading
The bounded seam behaves linearly for constant perturbations and preserves odd symmetry to numerical precision.
A slow synodic-like perturbation also passes through the same seam without breaking filtering or normalpoint generation.
This still validates software interface viability, not the physical correctness of a real delta_SEP insertion.
Next gate: whether true prediction/state-level delta_SEP fits through jjreadnp.f / jeulpkg.f without broad surgery.
